parsing_res_list.block_content:
∵四边形$ADE_{1}F_{1}$ 和$BCE_{2}F_{2}$ 都是菱形，$\angle DE_{1}F_{1}=\angle CE_{2}F_{2}=60^{\circ}$ 

E 
∴$DG\perp EF$ 

$DG=CG=\sqrt{3}$ F 
又$CD=AB=\sqrt{6}$ A 
即有$DG^{2}+CG^{2}=CD^{2},DG\perp CG$ 


$CG\cap EF=G,\quad CG,\quad EF\subset 平面 BCEF$ 

∴DG⊥平面BCEF 


$DG\subset 平面 AFED$ 

∴ 平面AFED⊥平面$BCEF$ 

（2）连接DF，DB 

由（1）知DG⊥平面BCEF，同理里CG⊥平面AFED 
且$S_{菱形BCEF}=2\times\sqrt{3}=2\sqrt{3},S_{\Delta ADF}=\frac{1}{2}\times2\times\sqrt{3}=\sqrt{3}$ 


$V=V_{D-BCEF}+V_{D-ABF}=V_{D-BCEF}+V_{B-ADF}=\frac{1}{3}S_{菱形BCEF}\cdot DG+\frac{1}{3}S_{\Delta ADF}\cdot CG$ 
$\frac{1}{3}\times2\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}+\frac{1}{3}\times\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ 12

$=3$ 

20.解：(1)$f^{\prime}(x)=\frac{-mx^{2}+2(m-1)x+4}{e^{x}}=\frac{-(mx+2)(x-2)}{e^{x}}$ 
令$f^{\prime}(x)=0$ ，解得$x=-\frac{2}{m} 或 x=2, 且 -\frac{2}{m}<2$ 


$x\in(-\infty,-\frac{2}{m}] 时,f^{\prime}(x)\leq0, 当 x\in(-\frac{2}{m},2) 时,f^{\prime}(x)>0,$ 

当.$x\in[2,+\infty)$ 时，$f^{\prime}(x)\leq0$ 

即$f(x)$ 的单调增区间为$(-\frac{2}{m},2)$ ，单调减区间为$\left[-\infty,-\frac{2}{m}\right],\left[2,+\infty\right)$ 5
(2)由(1)知，当$m>0,x\in[1,2]$ 时，$f^{\prime}(x)>0$ 恒成立

所以$f(x) 在 [1,2]$ 上为增函数，
即$f(x)_{\max}=f(2)=\frac{4m+2}{e^{2}},\quad f(x)_{\min}=f(1)=\frac{m}{e}$ 

$f(x_{1})-f(x_{2})$ 的最大值为$g(m)=f(x)_{\max}-f(x)_{\min}=\frac{(4-e)m+2}{e^2}$ 

B $\frac{4}{e^{2}}\geq\left[f(x_{1})-f(x_{2})\right]$ 恒成立10

$\frac{4}{e^{2}}\geq\frac{(4-e)m+2}{e^{2}}$ 

即$m\leq\frac{2}{4-e}$ 11

$m>0\quad\therefore\quad m\in\left(0,\frac{2}{4-e}\right]$ 

故m的取值范围$\left(0,\frac{2}{4-e}\right]$ 

21.解：(1)$e=\frac{c}{a}=\frac{\sqrt{2}}{2},\quad\therefore c^{2}=\frac{1}{2}a^{2}$ $b^{2}=a^{2}-c^{2}=\frac{1}{2}a^{2}$ 
椭圆的中心0到直线$x+y-2b=0$ 的距离为$5\sqrt{2}$ 


$\therefore\frac{|-2b|}{\sqrt{2}}=5\sqrt{2},\therefore b=5\therefore b^{2}=25,a^{2}=2b^{2}=50.$ 

∴椭圆C的方程为$\frac{x^{2}}{50}+\frac{y^{2}}{25}=1.$ 

(2)由（1）可知F(5，0)，由题可知直线AB的方程为$y=\sqrt{2}(x-5)$ ，与椭圆C 
的方程联立$\left\{\begin{aligned}y=\sqrt{2}(x-5)\\ \frac{x^{2}}{50}+\frac{y^{2}}{25}=1\end{aligned}\right.$ ，消去y得$x^{2}-8x+10=0$ 

设设$Q(x,y)$ $A(x_{1},y_{1}),\quad B(x_{2},y_{2})$ ，由$\overrightarrow{OQ}=\lambda\overrightarrow{OA}+\mu\overrightarrow{OB}\quad 得 \quad\lambda(x_{1},y_{1})+\mu(x_{2},y_{2})=(\lambda x_{1}+\mu x_{2},\lambda y_{1}+\mu y_{2})$ $A(x_{1},y_{1}),\quad B(x_{2},y_{2})$ ，则有$x_{1}+x_{2}=8,x_{1}x_{2}=10$ $\overrightarrow{OQ}=\lambda\overrightarrow{OA}+\mu\overrightarrow{OB}\quad 得 \quad\lambda(x_{1},y_{1})+\mu(x_{2},y_{2})=(\lambda x_{1}+\mu x_{2},\lambda y_{1}+\mu y_{2})$ 

$\begin{aligned}\therefore\left\{\begin{aligned}x=\lambda x_{1}+\mu x_{2},\\y=\lambda y_{1}+\mu y_{2},\end{aligned}\right.\end{aligned}$

E

$DG=CG=\sqrt{3}$ F 

又$CD=AB=\sqrt{6}$ A 

即有$DG^{2}+CG^{2}=CD^{2},DG\perp CG$ 



$CG\cap EF=G,\quad CG,\quad EF\subset 平面 BCEF$ 

∴DG⊥平面BCEF 



$DG\subset 平面 AFED$

（2）连接DF，DB

且$S_{菱形BCEF}=2\times\sqrt{3}=2\sqrt{3},S_{\Delta ADF}=\frac{1}{2}\times2\times\sqrt{3}=\sqrt{3}$ 



$V=V_{D-BCEF}+V_{D-ABF}=V_{D-BCEF}+V_{B-ADF}=\frac{1}{3}S_{菱形BCEF}\cdot DG+\frac{1}{3}S_{\Delta ADF}\cdot CG$ 

$\frac{1}{3}\times2\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}+\frac{1}{3}\times\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ 12

$=3$ 

20.解：(1)$f^{\prime}(x)=\frac{-mx^{2}+2(m-1)x+4}{e^{x}}=\frac{-(mx+2)(x-2)}{e^{x}}$ 

令$f^{\prime}(x)=0$ ，解得$x=-\frac{2}{m} 或 x=2, 且 -\frac{2}{m}<2$ 



$x\in(-\infty,-\frac{2}{m}] 时,f^{\prime}(x)\leq0, 当 x\in(-\frac{2}{m},2) 时,f^{\prime}(x)>0,$ 

当.$x\in[2,+\infty)$ 时，$f^{\prime}(x)\leq0$ 

即$f(x)$ 的单调增区间为$(-\frac{2}{m},2)$ ，单调减区间为$\left[-\infty,-\frac{2}{m}\right],\left[2,+\infty\right)$ 5

(2)由(1)知，当$m>0,x\in[1,2]$ 时，$f^{\prime}(x)>0$ 恒成立



所以$f(x) 在 [1,2]$ 上为增函数，

即$f(x)_{\max}=f(2)=\frac{4m+2}{e^{2}},\quad f(x)_{\min}=f(1)=\frac{m}{e}$ 

$f(x_{1})-f(x_{2})$ 的最大值为$g(m)=f(x)_{\max}-f(x)_{\min}=\frac{(4-e)m+2}{e^2}$ 

B $\frac{4}{e^{2}}\geq\left[f(x_{1})-f(x_{2})\right]$ 恒成立10

$\frac{4}{e^{2}}\geq\frac{(4-e)m+2}{e^{2}}$ 

即$m\leq\frac{2}{4-e}$ 11

$m>0\quad\therefore\quad m\in\left(0,\frac{2}{4-e}\right]$ 

故m的取值范围$\left(0,\frac{2}{4-e}\right]$

∴椭圆C的方程为$\frac{x^{2}}{50}+\frac{y^{2}}{25}=1.$

$\begin{aligned}\therefore\left\{\begin{aligned}x=\lambda x_{1}+\mu x_{2},\\y=\lambda y_{1}+\mu y_{2},\end{aligned}\right.\end{aligned}$
